title: Vulnerability sign-off attestation
description: Recorded decisions from SAST/SCA/Trivy/DAST manual review gates. One attestation per pipeline run, aggregating all four scanners' outcomes. Used by Kyverno/cosigned admission policy to enforce 'images carrying accepted findings cannot deploy to prod' regardless of valid signature.

run_id.description: GitHub Actions run ID — URL trace

reviewer.description: GitHub login of the actor who approved every gate that required approval. Equal to 'auto' when all gates auto-passed (no findings).

approved_at.description: UTC timestamp when the final gate completed.

status.description: clean = no findings; accepted = findings present and reviewer approved; skipped = scanner didn't run on this trigger

summary.description: Human-readable list of unexcepted finding IDs at gate time.

reason.description: Optional free-text justification carried from the workflow (typically a constant per environment, e.g. 'training-lab — intentional SQLi for demo').
